title: Research Radar — Mon May 11: Focus on AI Tools and Frameworks for LLMs
headline: Focus on AI Tools and Frameworks for LLMs
summary_text: Today's research highlights a surge in AI platforms and frameworks designed to enhance the deployment and management of large language models (LLMs). Projects like 'sglang' and 'mlflow' emphasize the growing need for robust tools that streamline AI workflows and improve model observability.
